chapter_title.en: The Reward of Helping a Believer, Relieving Him of Distress And Showing Him Kindness

text: 122 - وعن أبي إبراهيم الكاظم (ع) قال مَن فرَّجَ عن أخيه المسلم كُربةً فرّج الله عنه كُربة يوم القيامة.

en.muhajir-b-ali: 122.It has been related that Abu Ibrahim Musa al-Kadim (a.s) said: One who One who relieves his Muslim brother of a distress, Allah will compensate him for it (by relieving him) of a distress on the Day of Resurrection.
